Snail Mail Me

Send a real letter from your browser

Design a postcard or letter, type your message, and we'll print, stamp, and mail it to anyone in the world. Because some things are better on paper.

01

Snail Mail Me

CONSOLE // INTERACTIVE

02

What makes us different

Premium cardstock
Printed on thick, high-quality cardstock that feels great in your hands.
Worldwide delivery
Mail to any address in the world. We handle the stamps and postage.
Custom photos
Upload your own photos or choose from our curated design library.
Handwritten fonts
Messages are printed in fonts that look handwritten. Nobody has to know.
Scheduled sends
Schedule cards in advance for birthdays, anniversaries, and holidays.
No app needed
Everything happens in your browser. No downloads, no accounts required.
03

Why snail mail still matters

The power of physical mail

In a world of instant messages and email, receiving a physical letter or postcard is special. Studies show that physical mail is opened 90% of the time, compared to 20-30% for email. It's tangible, personal, and memorable.

Perfect for

Thank you notes that actually get displayed on a fridge. Birthday cards when you forgot until the last minute. Travel postcards when you're too busy enjoying the trip. Love letters that can be kept in a drawer forever. Business thank-yous that stand out from the digital noise.

How it works

Choose a design or upload your own image. Write your message. Enter the recipient's address. We print your card on premium cardstock, add a stamp, and drop it in the mail within 1 business day. Delivery takes 3-7 days domestically, 7-14 days internationally.

04

Frequently asked questions

Snail Mail Me

SnailMailMe.com is a concept demo. In a full version, cards would be printed and mailed via a print-and-mail API.
